calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment Request
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Adina Sivaraman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Desoto Cab Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Achadinha Cheese Company, Jim Pacheco, Donna Pacheco, or JD Pacheco Land LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

Witness: Corey Lamb, investigator sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $7,927.77
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,012.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $8,940.37

Judgment signed in open court.
